requirements.title: The Header Form field MUST be 1 bits long with value 1
requirements.notes: Long headers are classified from the first-byte high bit.

requirements.title: The Unused field MUST be 7 bits long
requirements.notes: Version Negotiation packets preserve the 7-bit unused field without making parse decisions from its value.

requirements.title: The Version field MUST be 32 bits long with value 0
requirements.notes: Version zero maps to Version Negotiation and is preserved by the parser.

requirements.title: The Destination Connection ID Length field MUST be 8 bits long
requirements.notes: The connection ID length byte is parsed as an 8-bit field and round-tripped by the parser and tests.

requirements.title: The Destination Connection ID field MUST be between 0 and 2040 bits long
requirements.notes: Version Negotiation packets can carry longer connection IDs when forming the packet.

requirements.title: The Source Connection ID Length field MUST be 8 bits long
requirements.notes: The connection ID length byte is parsed as an 8-bit field and round-tripped by the parser and tests.

requirements.title: An Initial packet MUST use long headers with a type value of 0x00
requirements.notes: The parser and packet view expose the Initial packet envelope fields, including the packet-number-length bits.

requirements.title: The Header Form field MUST be 1 bits long with value 1

requirements.title: The Fixed Bit field MUST be 1 bits long with value 1
requirements.notes: Non-Version Negotiation long headers validate the fixed bit before accepting the packet.

requirements.title: The Reserved Bits field MUST be 2 bits long
